title: Garren's Home
description: Garren has his forge; now he wants a door that doesn't answer to the inn. Build the house, assign him as resident at the management block, then talk to him to finish.

objectives.text: Receive the house plot token from Garren.
Place and build the house prefab.
Assign Garren as resident on the house management block.
Talk to Garren to complete the quest.
